description: Under the constitution written by the mythical lawgiver Lycurgus, the institution of the Agoge was established, where Spartans were trained from the age of 6 to be superior warriors in defense of the Spartan state.
tooltip: Champion Hoplites are available in p1, and may promote to Hippeis. They attack 10% faster than other champion spearman. P1 take 15% less train but have 50 less health, -1 of hack and peirce resistance and do 10% less dmg.  It is gained back through phasing up.
